headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Hunter Douglas PowerView shades (Generation 1 & 2 hubs). Shades are discovered automatically from the hub. Just save and restart — the defaults work for most setups.
footerDisplay: For shade-type overrides and resilience tuning, see the [README](https://github.com/omarshahine/homebridge-powerview-2#readme).

name.title: Name
name.description: Plugin name as shown in the Homebridge log.

host.title: Hub Hostname or IP
host.description: Hostname or IP address of your PowerView hub. Leave blank to auto-discover via the default mDNS name.

pollShadesForUpdate.title: Poll Shades For Updates
pollShadesForUpdate.description: Continuously poll the hub so HomeKit tiles stay populated. Recommended ON for Gen 2 hubs.

refreshShades.title: Refresh Shades On Read
refreshShades.description: Force a live RF query on every HomeKit read. Leave OFF on Gen 2 hubs — it causes HomeKit timeouts.

pollIntervalMs.title: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.description: How often to bulk-poll the hub when polling is enabled. Default 120000 (2 minutes).

setPositionDebounceMs.title: Slider Debounce (ms)
setPositionDebounceMs.description: Wait this long after the last slider move before commanding the shade, so dragging sends one final position instead of chasing every intermediate value. HomeKit streams slider updates ~1s apart, so values below ~1000 tend to leak intermediate moves. A single tap is delayed by this window. Set 0 to send every change immediately.

enablePostMoveVerify.title: Post-Move Verify
enablePostMoveVerify.description: After each commanded move, schedule one RF query to catch motor stalls and hub-cache drift. Coalesced per shade.

defaultVerifyDelay.title: Verify Delay (ms)
defaultVerifyDelay.description: How long after a move the verify query fires.

slowVerifyDelay.title: Slow-Shade Verify Delay (ms)
slowVerifyDelay.description: Verify delay used for shades listed in Slow Shades (heavy fabric / long travel).

slowShades.title: Slow Shades
slowShades.description: Shade IDs that travel slowly and need the longer verify delay.

healSweepIntervalMinutes.title: Heal Sweep Interval (minutes)
healSweepIntervalMinutes.description: Sequential RF-refresh walk across all shades to catch drift (e.g. shades moved by a Pebble remote). Default 720 (twice daily). Set 0 to disable.

healSweepGapMs.title: Heal Sweep Gap (ms)
healSweepGapMs.description: Delay between each shade during a heal sweep, to avoid overloading the hub.

forceRollerShades.title: Force Roller Shades
forceRollerShades.description: Shade IDs to force-treat as roller shades when the hub reports an unknown type.

forceTopBottomShades.title: Force Top-Down/Bottom-Up Shades
forceTopBottomShades.description: Shade IDs to force-treat as top-down/bottom-up shades.

forceHorizontalShades.title: Force Horizontal-Vane Shades
forceHorizontalShades.description: Shade IDs to force-treat as horizontal-vane shades (e.g. Silhouette, Pirouette).

forceVerticalShades.title: Force Vertical-Vane Shades
forceVerticalShades.description: Shade IDs to force-treat as vertical-vane shades (e.g. Luminette).
